subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of God! A gem must needs be replete with substance, for the purity and delicacy of all things lieth in their essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز خدا گوهر باید پرجوهر باشد زیرا صفای هر چیز و لطافتش بجوهر است
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
